name: In Phoenix, can judges sanction non-lawyers for bad AI advice?
description: Possible for frivolous filings; verify always.[2]

mainEntity.name: In Phoenix, can judges sanction non-lawyers for bad AI advice?

acceptedAnswer.text: Possible for frivolous filings; verify always.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Rare for pro se litigants, but courts penalize frivolous filings regardless of source.[2] AZ follows accuracy rules.[2] Key factors: Bad faith; prejudice; self-representation duties. Verify independently; cite real law. Use court self-help resources.
